notes: Fixtures are generated on demand and are not committed. Run the setup commands once
before executing the evals. {SKILL_DIR} = skill base directory.
All evals use --dry-run so no browser or Figma connection is required.
They validate route/view detection, prepare command construction, and
.capture-session.json output for route/view-only tabs (no label tabs).

evals.name: next-app-dry-run

fixture.result: src/app/ contains page.tsx (/), blog/page.tsx (/blog), and blog/[slug]/page.tsx (/blog/[slug])

evals.prompt: Use $bringing-codex-to-figma for a Next.js app at {SKILL_DIR}/testapp/next-app. New Figma file, desktop 1440x900. This is a validation run, so use --dry-run and do not open a real browser.
expected_behavior: Scout scans src/app/ and finds /, /blog, and /blog/[slug]
The dynamic segment is substituted with a concrete sample value
capture.mjs --prepare --dry-run is called with the discovered routes
.capture-session.json is written with dryRun: true and isLocal: true
tabs entries are route/view-only (no label divider entries)

assertions.name: .capture-session.json written
assertions.description: File written in the project directory

assertions.name: dryRun: true in session
assertions.description: Top-level dryRun field must be true

assertions.name: isLocal: true in session
assertions.description: App URL is localhost, so isLocal must be true

assertions.name: root route / in tabs
assertions.description: tabs includes an entry with viewName: '/'

assertions.name: dynamic route substituted
assertions.description: tabs includes a concrete path for /blog/[slug]

evals.name: react-spa-dry-run

fixture.result: A Vite React SPA with src/App.jsx tabs and capture-views.mjs

evals.prompt: Use $bringing-codex-to-figma for the React SPA at {SKILL_DIR}/testapp/react-spa. It has no URL router and already contains capture-views.mjs. New Figma file, desktop 1440x900. This is a validation run, so use --dry-run only.
expected_behavior: The project is identified as a state-driven SPA
.capture-session.json is written with non-URL view names
tabs entries are route/view-only (no label divider entries)

assertions.name: .capture-session.json written
assertions.description: File written in the project directory

assertions.name: dryRun: true in session
assertions.description: Top-level dryRun field must be true

assertions.name: tabs have non-URL view names
assertions.description: viewName values are SPA keys such as home, counter, about
